So I didn't realize that when you are asked to pick one unit to use for next battle, that you can add other units to the next battle.

I thought you had to do it with only 1 unit. I used Kipp and won a 4 on 1 battle for most of the stages.....

But I didn't get all the stars and I was wondering  what the heck I could do to get 1 unit to get all the stars...that's when I was like ooohhh II'm supposed to add more units...
